shortAnswer: DHEA-S is produced almost exclusively in the adrenal gland and serves as a precursor for sex hormones. Elevated values can indicate increased adrenal hormone production, low values normally decrease with age.
metaDescription: DHEA-S elevated or low? Meaning for adrenal gland function explained simply.
doctorQuestions: Could my DHEA-S value be related to increased body hair or cycle disorders?
